sections.label: Verse 1
lines: ka nuntakna nak Jesu Topa hi
Ka sapna khempeuh hongsik hong guan hi.
Ka sappen laitak kei ading hong si,
Ka sapna khempeuh kicing sak hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Singlamteh tungah kikhen,
Bang inlen bang in kilhcip
Siktukkilh a'i diam ? Siktukkilh hilo,
Hong itna hi zen veh
Hih thu ke'n bang tawh ka teh thei diam!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna koi ah om? Pasian lungtang ah,
Itna koi ah om ? Pasian lungtang ah.
Pasian lungtang tuibang hong sawp siang ta,
Itna in mawhna loh khin zo ta

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lainatna in kai, hamsiatna Sing ah,
Mawh na'n ling bang sun itna lungtang ah.
Jesu mawhna lom kisuaksak khin ta,
Hong mawhsakpa'n hong diksak zo ta.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Hong itna lian sa'ng, hong ngaihna sang sa'ng,
Lei le van akihal bangin kidang
Bang kasuak zen tam, hong it lo hi leh,
ka khitui khempeuh in cin ken ten.
